summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of the Referee-Manager Connection System. All features tested and passing: referee Find Managers page, manager Roster tab, connection request/accept/decline/withdraw flows, search/filter, dark mode on both pages. Data is MOCKED via localStorage.

design_issues.screen: Manager page header (pre-existing, not from new feature)
issues: Manager page heading 'League Management' uses hardcoded text-slate-950 and description uses text-slate-600 - these don't adapt to dark mode (low contrast in dark mode). Pre-existing issue.

action_items: MINOR: RosterTab.jsx imports Avatar from @/components/ui/avatar but never uses it - unused import cleanup opportunity
MINOR: Manager page header (index.jsx line 41) uses hardcoded text-slate-950 which doesn't adapt to dark mode - pre-existing issue
critical_code_review_comments: RosterTab.jsx: `import { Avatar } from '@/components/ui/avatar'` is an unused import - img tags are used directly instead

Manager/index.jsx: `

League Management

` - hardcoded dark text doesn't work in dark mode (pre-existing)

test_credentials.referee: referee@demo.com / password (via Demo Account -> Log in as Referee)
test_credentials.manager: manager@demo.com / password (via Demo Account -> Log in as Manager)

seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Used existing localStorage seed data plus localStorage injection for accept/decline testing (injected conn-test-pending and conn-test-decline).

features_tested.sidebar_find_managers_link: PASS - data-testid='sidebar-nav-find-managers' visible for referee role
features_tested.manager_cards_info: PASS - All cards show name, league, location, rating, tournaments, experience, certifications
features_tested.my_rosters_section: PASS - Demo Manager shows with 'On Roster' badge in My Current Rosters section
features_tested.pending_requests_section: PASS - Thomas Washington shows with 'Pending' badge in Pending Requests section
features_tested.available_managers_section: PASS - Sarah Chen and Marcus Johnson show in Available Managers section
features_tested.search_filter_by_name: PASS - Searching 'Sarah' shows only Sarah Chen
features_tested.search_filter_by_league: PASS - Searching 'Bay Area' shows Sarah Chen
features_tested.request_dialog_opens: PASS - Clicking 'Request to Join Roster' opens dialog with data-testid='connection-note-input'
features_tested.submit_connection_request: PASS - Clicking confirm-request-btn adds pending connection and shows toast
features_tested.withdraw_request: PASS - Clicking withdraw-btn-mgr-thomas removes the pending request and shows 'Request withdrawn' toast
features_tested.manager_roster_tab: PASS - data-testid='manager-tab-roster' present with pending count badge
features_tested.all_original_tabs_present: PASS - All 8 tabs: Tournaments, Assignments, Roster, Referees, Availability, Leaderboard, Standings, Reports
features_tested.roster_tab_incoming_requests: PASS - data-testid='pending-section' visible with 'Incoming Requests' heading
features_tested.roster_tab_my_referee_roster: PASS - data-testid='connected-section' shows Demo Referee, Olivia Brooks, Jordan Ellis (3 referees)
features_tested.accept_request_btn: PASS - data-testid='accept-request-conn-test-pending' changes status to connected, shows toast
features_tested.decline_request_btn: PASS - data-testid='decline-request-conn-test-decline' changes status to declined, shows toast
features_tested.contact_info_expand: PASS - Clicking 'Contact info' on referee cards expands to show phone and email
features_tested.dark_mode_find_managers: PASS - Dark mode applies correct styling (dark blue backgrounds, light text)
features_tested.dark_mode_roster_tab: PASS - Dark mode applies correct styling on Roster tab
features_tested.referee_cant_access_manager_page: PASS - /find-managers route is referee-only (Navigate to /dashboard if not referee)
features_tested.manager_no_find_managers: PASS - Find Managers link not shown in manager sidebar

mocked_apis: ALL data is MOCKED via localStorage (manager_connections CRUD, all existing CRUD)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pure frontend React/Vite app using localStorage for all data. All Referee-Manager Connection System features are fully functional. Previous iterations: 1-8 all passed. Testing done as iteration_9. Key test note: demo-manager has no pending connections in seed data, so accept/decline testing required localStorage injection via page.evaluate(). All 17 feature requirements from review_request tested and passing.
